corpus.title: Report: Atlas Manufacturing Quarterly Update

corpus.content: Atlas Manufacturing reported quarterly results in line with analyst expectations. Revenue of $309M was up 6.8% year-over-year. CEO remarked conditions remain favourable heading into the next quarter.

THREAD: What the media won't tell you about Oceanic Research Alliance

1/ A marine biology study reported coral bleaching decreased by 13% in protected reef zones compared to unprotected areas.
2/ And that's just the beginning. Do your own research.
3/ Like and repost if you think people need to see this.

corpus.title: Follow-up: Oceanic Research Alliance — Propagated Report
corpus.snippet: Follow-up coverage: A marine biology study reported coral bleaching decreased by...
corpus.content:
Oceanic Research Alliance ANNOUNCES CONTINUED SCIENTIFIC CONTROVERSY

Multiple sources now confirm: A marine biology study reported coral bleaching decreased by 13% in protected reef zones compared to unprotected areas. The announcement comes as reports circulating about scientific. Observers say this could have significant implications for scientific stakeholders. The full impact is expected to become clear over the coming months.
